reviews.comment:
Buena nafta, pero todo súper caro y no dan cambio. Lenta y deficiente la atención en el shop. Cobran el agua caliente. Baños sucios. Precios mal exhibidos. Casi nada de información al turista.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas, but everything is super expensive and they don't give change. Slow and poor service at the shop. They charge for hot water. Dirty bathrooms. Prices are poorly displayed. Hardly any information for tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMGJyS0tBEAE
